name: DashboardBlueprint
description: A 3-column responsive dashboard layout with header, sidebar, main content area, and optional footer. Ideal for admin panels, analytics views, and data-heavy applications.

visual.description: Full-screen layout with a fixed header at top, collapsible sidebar on the left, scrollable main content area, and optional footer. On mobile, the sidebar becomes a drawer that slides in from the left. Uses subtle borders and shadows to separate regions.
visual.layout: responsive grid with header + sidebar + main + footer regions

props.name: title
props.description: Dashboard title shown in the header

props.name: user
props.description: Current user data (name, avatar, role) for header display

props.name: sidebarItems
props.description: Navigation items for the sidebar (label, icon, href, active)

props.name: showFooter
props.description: Whether to show the footer region
